overall.description: A first-person view from inside a tent looking out at a campfire during dusk in a mountainous wilderness area. The scene is from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2), showing a tranquil campsite with the sky transitioning from sunset to night while the fire flickers in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: tent interior opening to wilderness campsite

agents.ego_description: sitting stationary inside a tent, watching the campfire burn as dusk settles over the mountains

dark fabric wall of the tent framing the right side of the view

silhouetted rocky mountains against the twilight sky
sparse bushes and small vegetation in the middle distance
purple and orange gradient sky with scattered clouds at sunset
rolled bedding or blanket visible to the left inside the tent

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary inside a tent, looking out at a flickering campfire during dusk. The tent fabric frames the view on both sides, while mountains silhouette against a purple-orange twilight sky in the distance. Sparse desert vegetation is visible to the left, and the scene is illuminated by the warm glow of the fire combined with the fading natural light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a stationary first-person perspective from within a shelter, capturing the transition of a wilderness campsite as twilight deepens. It begins framed by the fabric of a tent, looking out toward a flickering campfire that casts a warm, pulsing glow across the immediate surroundings. As the natural light fades, the distant mountains sharpen into dark silhouettes against a vivid purple-orange sky. The scene remains focused on this tranquil intersection of firelight and dusk, with sparse desert vegetation visible to the side under the shifting colors of the evening.
